testcase.name: Check room availability with checkout before checkin date
testcase.failure:
When User requests to check room availability with checkin "2025-07-25" and checkout "2025-07-20".passed Then API response status code should be 400.................................failed And Response should indicate invalid date range.............................skipped
StackTrace: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "io.restassured.response.Response.getStatusCode()" because "this.response" is null at com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.API_response_status_code_should_be(LoginAPIStepDefinition.java:51) at ✽.API response status code should be 400(file:///D:/Joshiba/Kata_Cucumber_Project/api_hotel_booking/src/test/resources/features/checkRoomAvailability.feature:46)
